title: Regulator / Integrity Investigator
setting: Integrity agency, regulator, or inquiry office
companySize: A specialist team inside a regulator or integrity body
description: This role sits inside the accountability layer. The work is evidence-heavy, procedural, and often sensitive. It is less theatrical than politics itself, but it is where institutional trust is tested.

schedule.activity: Review incoming matters, complaints, or case updates
Plan evidence requests and legal or procedural steps
Working lunch while drafting findings or next actions
Meet internal legal or senior case staff on the evidentiary threshold
Draft a findings note, recommendation, or procedural summary
Close the day with evidence requests, secure recordkeeping, and escalation notes

responsibilities: Maintain procedural fairness and secure records
Draft findings, recommendations, or case notes
Escalate matters according to legal and institutional rules
challenges: Need for neutrality and careful documentation
rewards: Deep exposure to accountability and rule-of-law work
Skill development in evidence, judgment, and process discipline
careerPath: Senior case manager or principal investigator
Move into senior integrity, inquiry, legal, or regulatory leadership
